descriptionHtml: /Users/dpp/*project/newdb/cyphertck/gdm-tck/features/0-original/clauses/with-orderBy/WithOrderBy2.feature: [12] Sort by a date expression in descending order
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Expected results but query failed: Query execution failed: {code: Neo.ClientError.Statement.SyntaxError} {message: Invalid statement syntax: cypher:  --> 3:52
  |
3 |   ORDER BY a.date + duration({months: 1, days: 2}) DESCENDING
  |                                                    ^---
  |
  = expected kw_and, kw_or, kw_xor, kw_limit, kw_skip, kw_in, kw_is, query_mid_clause, query_action, string_cmp_expr, prop_access, map_projection, subscript, cmp_op, add_op, mul_op, or sort_dir}
Cypher: MATCH (a)
WITH a
  ORDER BY a.date + duration({months: 1, days: 2}) DESCENDING
  LIMIT 2
RETURN a
